raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click the "Profile" link in the dropdown menu.
Looking at the image, the "Profile" link is located in the center of the screen, inside a light blue bordered box.
The coordinates for "Profile" appear to be around (500, 500) in a 1000x1000 coordinate system.
Let's refine the coordinates.
The central box is roughly from x=350 to x=650 and y=250 to y=750.
The "Profile" link is the first item in the inner blue box.
The inner blue box is roughly from x=375 to x=625 and y=460 to y=660.
The "Profile" section is roughly from y=460 to y=530.
The center of "Profile" would be around x=500, y=495.
